prestazioni: Engine: AM08 6.0L V12 (Code: AE31) with a bespoke forced-induction system utilizing a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (single-turbo conversion) paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe and a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate, pushing boost to 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) for a target of 750whp on E85 fuel. Supporting mods include a Cosworth forged crankshaft, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.0:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for structural integrity under extreme cylinder pressures.

Drivetrain: Upgraded Quaife ATB differential with a 3.73:1 final drive ratio (replacing the stock 3.46:1) for improved acceleration, paired with a Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch and a custom 6-speed Graziano transmission with cryogenically treated gears and a reinforced bellhousing to handle the increased torque. A Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU with Motec PDM15 power distribution module manages fueling, ignition, and turbo control via a custom flex-fuel sensor and Bosch Motorsport 2000cc injectors.

Suspension & Chassis: Full Öhlins TTX46 coilover system with 3-way adjustable dampers (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and spherical bearing top mounts, paired with a custom AST 5000N remote-reservoir hydraulic bump stop kit to prevent bottoming under extreme cornering. The front subframe is reinforced with a custom T45 steel gusset kit from RML Group, while the rear subframe receives a carbon fiber torque arm from GTSport for improved power delivery. Braking is handled by a full AP Racing CP9430 big brake kit with 400mm two-piece rotors, six-piston calipers, and Ferodo DS3000 pads, paired with a custom brake bias valve for track use.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber body kit from Prior Design (DB9 GT-specific), including a custom front splitter with integrated dive planes, a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (electronically adjustable via a switch in the cabin), and a fixed carbon fiber rear wing with a 1,200mm span and NACA ducts for rear brake cooling. The underbody is treated with a full carbon fiber flat floor from Vorsteiner, reducing lift by 40% at 150 mph.

Exterior Styling: Custom matte British Racing Green paint with a satin clear coat from Standox, applied over a full body dechroming and PPF (paint protection film) from XPEL Stealth. The front grille is replaced with a custom titanium mesh from Billet Specialties, while the side mirrors are swapped for carbon fiber units from Zunsport with integrated LED turn signals. The wheels are custom 20x9.5 (front) and 20x11 (rear) forged monoblocks from Dymag (model: RB1) in a gloss black finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/20 front, 305/30/20 rear).

Interior: Full carbon fiber weave interior from Aston Martin Works, including a custom roll cage (T45 steel) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360) and Sparco Pro 2000 seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses. The dashboard is replaced with a custom carbon fiber unit from Sabelt, housing a 12.3-inch digital display from AIM MXS Strada for telemetry, while the steering wheel is a suede-wrapped MOMO Prototipo with integrated paddle shifters and a quick-release hub. The rear seats are removed and replaced with a custom carbon fiber storage compartment for a fire extinguisher and a Motec C127 data logger.
